entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied for rust resistance

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A foliar disease caused by Puccinia arachidis Speg. that reduces seed quality and production

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal organism that causes rust disease in groundnut

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut to withstand rust infection, often inherited as a quantitative trait or controlled by recessive genes

entities.name: DNA MARKER TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to minimize linkage drag and accelerate the development of resistant varieties

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to identify molecular variation and associate with traits

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: The controlled environment used to evaluate parents and F2 populations for rust resistance

entities.name: ICGV 99003
entities.description: A groundnut parent variety used in crosses to study rust resistance

entities.name: TMV 2
entities.description: A groundnut parent variety used in crosses to study rust resistance

entities.name: ICGV 99005
entities.description: A groundnut parent variety used in crosses to study rust resistance

entities.name: ATT SSR REPEAT FAMILIES
entities.description: A specific family of SSR repeats identified in the polymorphic variation

entities.name: AG SSR REPEAT FAMILIES
entities.description: A specific family of SSR repeats identified in the polymorphic variation

entities.name: WILCOXON TEST
entities.description: A statistical method used to test the significance of the association between markers and rust disease scores
